summary: Phase 2 backend + frontend testing complete. Backend: 64/64 pytest pass (27 phase 1 regression + 37 new phase 2 covering Plans CRUD, Templates layout zones, Admin Devices hydration, Client role auth/me/stats with vertical extras, Devices CRUD with auto pair_code, Doctor flow + public booking with token increment, Retailer products, Society rooms, Cascade on dealer/template delete, Email uniqueness across users+clients, Role enforcement). Frontend: Admin Plans/Devices/Templates(layout zones) flows verified; client login redirects to /client; client dashboard shows doctor KPI (Appointments Today=1); Storefront DoctorPanel renders profile + appointments; Devices Pair-screen dialog has name/location/pair-code(auto-generate hint)/layout template dropdown; Public /book/{cid} renders doctor profile, accepts booking, displays Token #1 confirmation and Book another resets the form.

integration_issues.flow: Dealer panel navigation via page.goto after login
integration_issues.issue: Hard reload to /dealer/clients after dealer login returned two 401 console errors and did not load the form. Sidebar-link navigation should still work; same login session works for admin. Likely the AuthContext stores access_token in memory only (not cookie-restored on full navigation). Reproduced once; admin had no such issue.

design_issues.screen: Multiple modals (Plans, Templates, Pair Screen, Client form)
issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' on every shadcn Dialog — accessibility a11y warning; add DialogDescription or aria-describedby.

action_items: Investigate dealer panel auth persistence: on hard reload/page.goto to /dealer/*, requests get 401. Likely AuthContext doesn't read token from cookie on mount, only relies on in-memory state from login response. Restore by reading from httpOnly cookie via /auth/me on app load, or fall back to localStorage.
Suppress shadcn DialogContent a11y warning by adding DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to every Dialog (Plans, Templates, Pair Screen, Dealer Client form).
Phase 1 test file test_signage_admin.py was updated to include 'password' in dealer-create-client payload (required after phase 2 schema change). Confirmed regression now passes.

Cosmetic leak: TEST D-Tpl and TEST Other templates remain in Admin Templates list from earlier runs (cleanup ran but templates created without dealer might persist). Consider DELETE-by-name TEST_* cleanup script.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/client/doctor/appointments/{aid}/status uses query param ?status= — works but inconsistent with REST norms; consider request body.
gen_pair_code() takes first 6 chars of uuid.int — collisions possible at scale; no uniqueness index on pair_code, so two devices could share a code.
Public booking endpoint /api/public/doctors/{cid}/book has no rate limiting; could be spammed and inflate today's token counter.

Cascade on admin/templates delete pulls assigned_template_ids and unsets device.template_id but does NOT touch products/rooms; acceptable since those don't reference templates, but worth a one-liner comment.

Email uniqueness is checked across users+clients at create time (good), but updating a dealer/client email does not re-check uniqueness against the other collection — duplicate-email edge case via PUT.
set_apt_status Literal includes 'pending' but body type-hint relies on FastAPI's query-param Literal parsing; verified working but if 'status' missing returns 422.

FRONTEND_URL in backend/.env still points to 6dbd5dca-...preview.emergentagent.com while the actual served frontend is dealer-client-mgmt.preview.emergentagent.com — CORS allow_origins won't match, cookies with samesite=none/secure require explicit origin. Recommend aligning.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% — admin & client & public verified, dealer hard-reload nav flake

test_credentials: admin@admin.com/admin123, dealer@demo.com/dealer123, UI test doctor client uidoc_357030@x.com/docpass (id=45ee878e-c2ad-4c63-8fae-f5db05f8e037)
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_-prefixed dealers/clients/templates/devices/products/rooms/plans and cleaned them up. One UI doctor client (uidoc_357030@x.com) left for retest convenience.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 fully covered. If reverifying, just run pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. For UI smoke: admin & client flows work via login form, but dealer panel may need a fresh login if reaching it via direct URL navigation (auth restore on mount). Public booking URL pattern: {frontend}/book/{clientId} where vertical=doctor.
